description: Input parameters for engineering modular biosensors for metabolite-responsive regulation of transcription

biosensor_design_challenge.problem: Limited naturally evolved biosensors for monitoring desired metabolites
biosensor_design_challenge.goal: Generalizable approach for constructing diverse novel biosensors

design_strategy.approach: Modular protein design with synthetic promoters
components: Programmable DNA binding domain (zinc finger protein - ZFP)

metabolic_engineering_application.use_case: Monitor metabolite levels in individual cells
